topic: Percentage of consumers who search online before visiting a local business
caption:
76% of local searches end in a same-day visit.
If you have no website, you are invisible to that customer.
In Victorville, Hesperia, Apple Valley - that is real foot traffic walking past you.

copy.headline: of consumers visit a business within 24 hours of searching
copy.body: 76% of people who search for something nearby visit a business that day. (Source: Google/Ipsos local search behavior study)
